channel.title: Texas - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!
channel.copyright: Copyright © Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion! 2026

image.title: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

item.title: Real Ale Brewing: Full Moon Pale Rye Ale, Ep. 161
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle the rise of Rye! It seems we are seeing more and more beers using this ingredient that doesn’t actually taste like you think it would when you think of Rye. A great example of that is Real Ale’s Full Moon Rye Pale Ale, a wonderful beer that […]

The post Real Ale Brewing: Full Moon Pale Rye Ale, Ep. 161 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Not many brewers can say their family has been brewing in the US for over 150 years, but Fritz Rahr certainly can . The Beer America team of Paul Leone and John Pinkerton spent some time with Fritz and learned many things like their brewing history, why limited edition beers are limited edition, and that […]

The post An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Saint Arnold Brewing: Spring Bock, Ep. 141
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We’ve been trying Bock beers lately on Beer America TV, and this week we continue the theme with Spring Bock from Saint Arnold Brewing Company. Spring Bock is an authentic German style bock that is malty goodness from beginning to end. They call it the laziest beer they brew because it takes 8 weeks to […]

The post Saint Arnold Brewing: Spring Bock, Ep. 141 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rahr & Sons: Bucking Bock, Ep. 140
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Spring brings flowers, green grass, warmer weather and for Beer America TV, it also brings Bock beers. This week we dive into an excellent Bock beer from Rahr & Sons located in Fort Worth Texas. It’s a an extremely well balanced beer and true to the style with a hefty 7.5 % ABV . Easy […]

The post Rahr & Sons: Bucking Bock, Ep. 140 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Saint Arnold’s Divine Reserve 10, Ep. 138
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
On this weeks episode of Beer America TV, we head back to Rahr and Son’s Brewing and talk with Scooter Hendon with TexasBrews.org. He brought us a hard to find beer from Saint Arnold’s called Divine Reserve 10. DR10 is a limited edition series English Style Barleywine and is described as a big, strong, spicy […]

The post Saint Arnold’s Divine Reserve 10, Ep. 138 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2011 North Texas Beer Festival, Ep. 136
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week we’re are at the first ever North Texas Beer Festival which was held at the Plano Center just outside of Dallas. Beer America TV had a booth and the opportunity to interview festival attendees and brewers, which we’ll be posting in the next few weeks . In the mean time, enjoy this conversation […]

The post 2011 North Texas Beer Festival, Ep. 136 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Southern Star: Buried Hatchet Stout, Ep. 127
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Texas is known for a lot of things, but American Craft beer is NOT one of them. Sure there are a few quality breweries here and the scene is getting larger with many more opening up – especially in Austin! With that said, this week on Beer America TV, we try an excellent stout from […]

The post Southern Star: Buried Hatchet Stout, Ep. 127 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rahr & Sons Brewing Company: Winter Warmer, Ep. 123
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Living in Fort Worth Texas has many good aspects to it, and of course one of those good things is living close to Rahr & Sons Brewing Company. This week on Beer America TV we discuss their Winter Warmer, which is described as an English Dark Ale . Thick and hearty in appearance, this 8.5% […]

The post Rahr & Sons Brewing Company: Winter Warmer, Ep. 123 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
